name: NPAW (Nice People At Work)
description: NPAW — video and ad analytics with Youbora for broadcasters and OTT

seo.title: NPAW (Nice People At Work) — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: NPAW (Nice People At Work): NPAW — video and ad analytics with Youbora for broadcasters and OTT

when_to_use: Video QoE and ad analytics with Youbora for OTT platforms
Measuring rebuffering and bitrate quality for streaming apps
Per-viewer engagement and session analytics for broadcasters
Real-time video performance monitoring at broadcaster scale
CDN performance comparison using playback analytics data

pros: Deep video QoE and ad analytics (Youbora)
Used by major OTT broadcasters (DAZN, Mediaset)
Ad insertion analytics rare in the space
cons: SDK size impacts mobile app weight
UI feels legacy vs Mux Data
review.verdict: Premium video analytics for big OTT — worth it if ads fund your business, pointless if not.
review.best_for: OTT broadcasters tracking QoE and ad performance across many player SDKs.
review.not_for: Small publishers — Mux Data or Bitmovin Analytics is simpler.

lock_in.reason: Video analytics SDK with deep integration
